case_title: ANTHONY WILSON BELMONTE VS. JEREMY HUNTER et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON AS TO DEFENDANT HUNTER, JEREMY AKA JEREMY HUNTER II DOES 1 TO 20,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUNTER, JEREMY AKA JEREMY HUNTER II THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 PERRY STREET, UNIT #615, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $1,734.59 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,734.59, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HUNTER, JEREMY AKA JEREMY HUNTER II

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO PLTF'S POSSESSION ONLY; AS TO DEFENDANT HUNTER, JEREMY AKA JEREMY HUNTER II
ORDER THAT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION BE ENTERED
